title: centaurea × ceballosii
intro: Centaurea × ceballosii is a hybrid plant species within the Asteraceae family, derived from the cross between Centaurea corymbosa and Centaurea cuneifolia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of terpenoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Centaurea × ceballosii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to support digestive health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × ceballosii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
